title: Lightly Optimized
body:
Lightly Optimized is a performance-focused modpack designed to boost FPS while keeping the vanilla Minecraft experience intact. Ideal for lower-end systems or anyone who wants smoother gameplay without major overhauls.

This pack includes key optimization mods like Sodium, Lithium, Starlight, and others that improve rendering, lighting, and world performance. It loads fast, runs light, and feels just like Minecraft—only smoother.

Whether you're building, exploring, or surviving, Lightly Optimized helps Minecraft run better without getting in the way.
